overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through a futuristic neon-lit pedestrian overpass in Night City. The player ascends concrete stairs, passes through corridors with vending machines and advertisements, and overlooks busy streets with dense cyberpunk architecture and heavy traffic below.

long horizontal LED light strips mounted on concrete walls emitting white light

illuminated commercial signs visible through openings in the structure

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person ascent up a wide concrete staircase within a covered pedestrian walkway. Linear LED lights line both walls, casting a cool white glow on the gray concrete surfaces. A few pedestrians descend toward the camera, and distant neon advertisements are visible through openings in the structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper level pedestrian walkway with seating area and burning barrel

turns corner into area with warmer orange lighting from burning barrel

agents.ego_description: reaches the top of the stairs and turns right into a seating area with benches

notable_agents.action: person sitting on concrete bench wearing pink top and shorts

entered.detail: scattered newspapers and litter strewn across the concrete floor
long rectangular concrete seating structures with people resting

segments.scene_description: After ascending the stairs, the scene opens into an upper walkway littered with trash. The camera turns right into a seating area where a person sits on a concrete bench near a burning barrel that casts a warm orange glow. Potted plants and concrete furniture line the area as the environment transitions from cool artificial light to mixed lighting.

events.description: enters corridor lined with brightly illuminated vending machines and digital advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking past rows of vending machines and digital advertisements

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a corridor lined with brightly lit vending machines in purple and red hues. Digital posters display advertisements on the walls. A person browses at a vending machine on the right. The environment is fully enclosed with artificial lighting replacing the mixed lighting of the previous area.

scene_state.functional_zone: descending concrete stairway to lower level

events.description: begins descending stairs to reach the lower walkway level

agents.ego_description: walking down concrete stairs toward the lower walkway level

entered.detail: descending concrete stairs with scattered trash and debris on steps

segments.scene_description: The player descends a concrete stairway leading to the lower level of the pedestrian overpass. A person in an orange jacket walks ahead down the stairs. The walls are bare concrete with linear lights, and trash is scattered on the steps.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with panoramic city views

events.description: exits stairway onto lower walkway with open view of neon-lit cityscape
panoramic view of Orbital Air sign and dense highway traffic becomes visible

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered walkway with views of the neon city and traffic below

entered.detail: large illuminated corporate sign with blue neon lettering reading ORBITAL AIR
large advertisement showing a woman's face with green DYNALAR branding
dense cluster of skyscrapers with illuminated windows and neon signs
multi-lane road with streams of moving vehicle lights visible below
low concrete wall with glass panels overlooking the city streets

segments.scene_description: The scene opens onto a lower walkway with sweeping views of Night City. The camera moves along a concrete path with glass railings overlooking dense highway traffic below. Prominent neon signs including the Orbital Air corporate logo and Dynalar advertisements illuminate the skyline. The environment transitions from enclosed to semi-open with mixed artificial and ambient neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated overlook of busy urban intersection

events.description: reaches open overlook with direct view down onto street intersection and crosswalks

agents.ego_description: standing at the railing looking down at the busy intersection and traffic below

entered.detail: busy multi-lane intersection with zebra crosswalks and traffic signals
tall buildings covered in bright red and pink neon advertisements and corporate logos
illuminated signal lights showing green for traffic flow

segments.scene_description: The final segment presents a dramatic overlook of a busy urban intersection from the elevated walkway. The camera gazes down at streaming traffic, illuminated crosswalks, and towering buildings covered in vibrant neon billboards. The Orbital Air sign remains visible in the distance as the scene emphasizes the dense, illuminated cyberpunk cityscape below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a futuristic pedestrian overpass that transitions from enclosed concrete corridors into a sweeping panoramic view of a neon-lit metropolis. It begins with an ascent up a wide concrete staircase illuminated by cool white LED strips, moving upward past descending pedestrians toward distant neon glows. As the camera reaches the top, the scene opens into a gritty seating area where the cool light shifts to a warm orange glow from a burning barrel, before turning into a narrow corridor saturated with the purple and red hues of glowing vending machines and digital advertisements. The camera then descends another concrete stairway, following a figure in an orange jacket back toward the lower levels of the structure. Finally, the environment expands from the enclosed walkway onto a semi-open path with glass railings, revealing a dramatic overlook of dense highway traffic and towering skyscrapers crowned by vibrant Orbital Air and Dynalar neon signs.
